text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: HCIdea™ Prescriber Database 

VALUES: (e.g., MD, DO, RN, DPM) 

COMMENT: This variable is populated by linking to the proprietary HCIdea™ Prescriber Database. HCIdea obtains 
prescriber information from a variety of data sources, including the NPPES directory (which has each 
unique NPI that has been assigned to a provider), the Drug Enforcement Administration, and 
SureScripts (a nationwide e-prescribing network). Information regarding credentials is
